quote: If you are not living each day with excitement, energy, and passion, then you are not living true to your life purpose. – Celestine Chua
fact: The Main Library at Indiana University sinks over an inch every year because when it was built, engineers failed to take into account the weight of all the books that would occupy the building.
joke: What did the big flower say to the littler flower? Hi, bud!
